setups_outcome_chk.name: setups_outcome_chk
setups_outcome_chk.value: outcome IS NULL OR outcome IN ('WIN','LOSS','PARTIAL_WIN','TIME_OUT','REJECTED','INVALIDATED_PRE_TRADE','INVALIDATED_POST_TRADE','EXPIRED_NO_FILL','KILLED')

setups_exit_reason_chk.name: setups_exit_reason_chk
setups_exit_reason_chk.value: exit_reason IS NULL OR exit_reason IN ('TP_HIT','SL_HIT','TTL_EXPIRED','INVALIDATED','KILLED')
